name: prescribe
description: Record infrastructure intent before a mutation. Use it before operations like kubectl apply, terraform apply, helm upgrade, docker build, argocd sync, or oc apply. Returns a prescription_id, risk level, and artifact context for the later report step.

arguments.name: tool
arguments.desc: Infrastructure tool name such as kubectl, terraform, helm, docker, argocd, or oc.

arguments.name: operation
arguments.desc: Mutation operation such as apply, destroy, upgrade, sync, build, or delete.

arguments.name: raw_artifact
arguments.desc: Raw artifact content such as a YAML manifest, Terraform plan JSON, or other operation payload.

arguments.name: actor
arguments.desc: Actor identity. Required fields are type, id, and origin.

arguments.name: environment
arguments.desc: Optional environment label such as production or staging.

name: report
description: Record the terminal outcome after an infrastructure operation completes or is deliberately declined. Use it exactly once for each prescription_id returned by prescribe.

arguments.name: verdict
arguments.desc: Terminal result: success, failure, error, or declined.

arguments.name: exit_code
arguments.desc: Exit code for success, failure, or error outcomes.

arguments.name: decision_context
arguments.desc: Required for declined verdicts. Include trigger and reason.

arguments.name: actor
arguments.desc: Optional actor identity, usually matching the prescribe actor.

name: get_event
description: Retrieve a previously recorded evidence event by event_id for debugging, correlation, or audit lookup.
